message:
perf(like): consolidate LIKE into shared fast-path engine, eliminate Vec<char> allocation

Replace the duplicate recursive LIKE implementation in fsqlite-func with a
call to the shared sql_like() from fsqlite-types. Add classify_like_fast_path()
that short-circuits full recursive descent for five common LIKE shapes
(MatchAll, Exact, Prefix, Suffix, Contains) using byte-level ASCII
case-insensitive helpers. Covers bd-wwqen.6.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
